ItвАЩs now time for Group C and Group B to step into the battleground and fight for crucial points in the race ahead. Every match matters, every finish counts, and only the strongest squads will keep their momentum alive.

snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal вАФ where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor вАФ the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni вАФ accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as VickyвАЩs Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures & Neem Tree Entertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani
DOP: Stanley Mudda

Action Director: Amit Naikar
DA & Script Supervisor: Himanshu Raj KanthCrew

ta.description:

аЃ∞аѓЛаЃ™аѓНаЃ≤аЃЊаЃХаѓНаЃЄаѓН аЃµаѓАаЃЯаЃњаЃѓаѓЛаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБ @OPGamerBlox-аЃР аЃЪаЃ™аѓНаЃЄаѓНаЃХаЃњаЃ∞аѓИаЃ™аѓН аЃЪаѓЖаЃѓаѓНаЃѓаѓБаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аѓН вЭ§пЄП

рЯ§Ч аЃЗаЃ©аѓНаЃЄаѓНаЃЯаЃЊаЃХаЃњаЃ∞аЃЊаЃЃаЃњаЃ≤аѓН аЃОаЃ©аѓНаЃ©аѓИаЃ™аѓН аЃ™аЃњаЃ©аѓНаЃ§аѓКаЃЯаЃ∞аѓБаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аѓН: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

аЃЗаЃ®аѓНаЃ§ аЃµаѓАаЃЯаЃњаЃѓаѓЛ аЃЙаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБаЃ™аѓН аЃ™аЃњаЃЯаЃњаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аЃњаЃ∞аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБаЃЃаѓН аЃОаЃ©аѓНаЃ±аѓБ аЃ®аЃЃаѓНаЃ™аѓБаЃХаЃњаЃ±аѓЗаЃ©аѓН. аЃ™аЃњаЃЯаЃњаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аЃњаЃ∞аѓБаЃ®аѓНаЃ§аЃЊаЃ≤аѓН, аЃ§аЃѓаЃµаѓБаЃЪаѓЖаЃѓаѓНаЃ§аѓБ аЃ≤аѓИаЃХаѓН аЃЪаѓЖаЃѓаѓНаЃ§аѓБ аЃ™аЃХаЃњаЃ∞аѓБаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аѓН.

1976 аЃЖаЃЃаѓН аЃЖаЃ£аѓНаЃЯаЃњаЃ©аѓН аЃ™аЃ§аЃњаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аѓБаЃ∞аЃњаЃЃаѓИаЃЪаѓН аЃЪаЃЯаѓНаЃЯаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аЃњаЃ©аѓН аЃ™аЃњаЃ∞аЃњаЃµаѓБ 107-аЃЗаЃ©аѓН аЃХаѓАаЃіаѓН аЃ™аЃ§аЃњаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аѓБаЃ∞аЃњаЃЃаѓИ аЃЃаЃ±аѓБаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аѓБаЃ∞аѓИ: аЃµаЃњаЃЃаЃ∞аѓНаЃЪаЃ©аЃЃаѓН, аЃХаЃ∞аѓБаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аѓБаЃ∞аѓИ, аЃЪаѓЖаЃѓаѓНаЃ§аЃњ аЃЕаЃ±аЃњаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓИ, аЃХаЃ±аѓНаЃ™аЃњаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аЃ≤аѓН, аЃХаЃ≤аѓНаЃµаЃњ, аЃЖаЃ∞аЃЊаЃѓаѓНаЃЪаѓНаЃЪаЃњ аЃ™аѓЛаЃ©аѓНаЃ± аЃ®аѓЛаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃЊаЃХ "аЃ®аЃњаЃѓаЃЊаЃѓаЃЃаЃЊаЃ© аЃ™аЃѓаЃ©аѓНаЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаѓНаЃЯаЃњаЃ±аѓНаЃХаѓБ" аЃЕаЃ©аѓБаЃЃаЃ§аЃњ аЃµаЃіаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЯаѓБаЃХаЃњаЃ±аЃ§аѓБ.

аЃ®аЃњаЃѓаЃЊаЃѓаЃЃаЃЊаЃ© аЃ™аЃѓаЃ©аѓНаЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаѓБ аЃОаЃ©аѓНаЃ™аЃ§аѓБ аЃ™аЃ§аЃњаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аѓБаЃ∞аЃњаЃЃаѓИаЃЪаѓН аЃЪаЃЯаѓНаЃЯаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ≥аЃЊаЃ≤аѓН аЃЕаЃ©аѓБаЃЃаЃ§аЃњаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЯаѓНаЃЯ аЃТаЃ∞аѓБ аЃ™аЃѓаЃ©аѓНаЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаЃЊаЃХаѓБаЃЃаѓН, аЃЗаЃ≤аѓНаЃ≤аѓИаЃѓаѓЖаЃ©аЃњаЃ≤аѓН аЃЕаЃ§аѓБ аЃЃаѓАаЃ±аЃ≤аЃЊаЃХаЃХаѓН аЃХаЃ∞аѓБаЃ§аЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЯаЃ≤аЃЊаЃЃаѓН.

ar.title: ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ўКЎ™ Ў≥ўКЎІЎ±Ў© ўЕЎ±Ў≥ўКЎѓЎ≥ AMG1 ўИўГЎІЎ±ўКЎ±ЎІ 911 рЯ§С | ЎЇЎІўДўКЎ© ЎІўДЎЂўЕўЖ
ar.description:
ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ўГўИЎІ ўБўК ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© ўДўЕЎіЎІўЗЎѓЎ© ўБўКЎѓўКўИўЗЎІЎ™ ЎђЎѓўКЎѓЎ©
ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ўГўИЎІ ўБўК ўВўЖЎІЎ© @OPGamerBlox ўДўЕЎіЎІўЗЎѓЎ© ўБўКЎѓўКўИўЗЎІЎ™ Ў±ўИЎ®ўДўИўГЎ≥ вЭ§пЄП

рЯ§Ч Ў™ЎІЎ®ЎєўИўЖўК ЎєўДўЙ Ў•ўЖЎ≥Ў™ЎЇЎ±ЎІўЕ: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Ў£Ў™ўЕўЖўЙ Ў£ўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ўВЎѓ ўЖЎІўД Ў•ЎєЎђЎІЎ®ўГўЕЎМ ўИЎ•ўЖ Ў£ЎєЎђЎ®ўГўЕЎМ ўБўДЎІ Ў™ўЖЎ≥ўИЎІ ЎІўДЎ•ЎєЎђЎІЎ® ўИЎІўДўЕЎіЎІЎ±ўГЎ©.

snippet.title: Hum Yaar Hain Tumhare Dildar Hai Tumhare | Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu | Abhishek Bachchan , Karisma
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Singers: Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer
Edit & Gfx : Nadeem Akhtar (Paperboyz Studioz)

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Suneel Darshan
Director: Dharmesh Darshan
Cast: Akshay Kumar, Abhishek Bachchan, Karishma Kapoor

Lyrics:
Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Jaan maine bhi pyaar kiya haiHaan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Jaan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai
Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo

There is a friend for little children
Above the bright blue skies
A friend who never changes
Whose love never dies
Unlike our friends by nature
Who change with changing years
This friend is always with us
His name is god alone

Kaise main bhula doon woh beete huye pal
Har lamha sataaye woh gujaraa hua kal
Kaise main bataun yeh mushkil raaz hai
Kal aaye na kabhi jo hai woh aaj hai
Meri jaan paas aa ke bol do
Muskura ke chup na raha karo
Chup na raha karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par mila karo

Aa..

Phoolon ki waadiyan, barfeele raaste
Hain jaan-e-tamanna sab tere vaaste
Phoolon mein hai chubhan
Sardi mein agan hai
Saanson mein raat din
Yeh kaisi jalan hai
He he he he he he he
Ha ha ha ha he he he he
Sard thandi havaaein
Keh rahi hain fizaayein
Yun na jalaa karo
Yun na jalaa karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo

Hum pyaar hain tumhare
Dildar hain tumhaare
Humse mila karo, humse mila karo
Koi shikwa agar ho
Aur shikaayat agar ho
Humse gila karo par tum mila karo
Haan maine bhi pyaar kiya hai

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Chameli [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Chameli - Ekdev Limbu (Official Video)

A broken-down car. Three unexpected encounters. One unforgettable journey.

Follow Ekdev through Chitwan as he experiences love, romance, and adventure in the most carefree way. Where reality and dreams merge into moments that change everything.

рЯОµ STREAM NOW рЯСЗ
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6m8AXJov9kDgC8MmUiC5ex

Akriti Negi
Deekila Sherpa

AUDIO 
Artist: Ekdev Limbu
Composition & Lyrics: Ekdev Limbu
Add Composition and Lyrics: Prakash Chandra Shrestha & Salin Magar
Producer: Saswot Shrestha
Mixing and Mastering Engineer: Saswot Shrestha
Audio Production Studio: Omniphonics Studio
Studio Assistance: Pradhumna Shrestha

VIDEO
Production Company: Numa Films 
Director: Anjon Limbu
Co-Director: Rob
Assistant Director: Sanjay Limbu
DOP: Saurav Lamichhane
1st AC / Camera Operator: Sushil Khanal

DOP: Nihal Bhandari (Second Unit)

Stylist: Markush Tamang
Makeup Artist: Mila Shrestha
Assistant Makeup Artist: Roshni Shrestha
Editor: Rob

Color Assistant: Sadeep Khatri
Behind the Scenes: Aditya Lama
Assistant Production Manager: Sandesh Shahi

CHOREOGRAPHY
Dance Choreography: Sushant Khatri
Assistant Choreography: Ashmee bhujel
Dance Coordinator: Sujan Rai

LIGHTING DEPARTMENT
Gaffer: Pawan Uraw
Lightman: Himal Sharma
Grip: Vten Bhai

Line production manager - Sujan rai 

LOCATION SPONSORS
Banbas Resort, Chitwan 
Bagar Hospitality, Chitwan

TRAVEL PARTNER
Nepal Vision

SPECIAL THANKS
Hook Studio and OSR Digital 

Special featured: "Lahana Le Jurayo Ki"
Singer: Sadhana Sargam | Lyrics: Tulsi Ghimire | Music: Ranjit Gajmer

Artist Manager: Bhaba Shrestha 
For Business inquiries : ekdevlimbu@gmail.com  

Promotional Partner : Pradhumna Nepal & Sarthak Khadka

Listen to the soulful and divine Sojugada Sooju Mallige | а≤Єа≥Ла≤Ьа≥Ба≤Ча≤Ња≤¶ а≤Єа≥Ва≤Ьа≥Ба≤Ѓа≤≤а≥На≤≤а≤ња≤Ча≥Ж, one of the most popular Lord Shiva Kannada Devotional Songs (Shiva Haadugalu) that touches the heart of every devotee.

This powerful song glorifies Lord Shiva (Mahadeva / Shambho) and is widely loved for its deep spiritual meaning and devotional feel. Devotees believe that listening to Shiva songs brings peace, removes negativity, and fills life with divine blessings and positivity.

This collection of Kannada Shiva devotional songs is perfect for daily prayers, meditation, Monday special worship, and spiritual upliftment. Let the divine vibrations of Shiva Bhakti Geethegalu fill your life with peace, strength, and devotion.

рЯЩП Om Namah Shivaya
рЯЩП Hara Hara Mahadeva

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Virgin Music India Team :-
Head : Amit Sharma 
Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Krupa Munvar, Lavanya Dass & Nishtha Sikroria

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Ye bootal bhari bharai ,,
Na hothon say lagai ,,
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,,
Usne aankho say pillai ,,

Pehle toh najar milaai ,
Dekh kay muskuraayi/ muskaaayi
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,
Usne aankho say pilaayi ,,


Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,


Chanachal kajraari aankeyy ,,
Haaye shikaari aankehi ,,
Dil pay chalaye churriya 
Teri kataari aankhein ,,

Naagin c haaye julfey ,,
Kaali ghataye julfey ,,
Maaregi toba toba ,,
Teri blaaye julfey ,,

Tootay chaand ka garur ,
Tere cehray ka Noor ,,
Tujhey dekh dekh hota hai deewane ko sarur ,,

Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,
#sharab #himeshreshammiya #manushichhillar #hugel #viral #trending

1990 а§Ха•З а§¶а§ґа§Х а§Ха•З а§Єа•Ба§®а§єа§∞а•З а§¶а•Ма§∞ а§Єа•З, а§Ха•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Єа§Ња§®а•В а§Ха•А а§Жа§µа§Ња§Ьа§Љ а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ьа§Ња§¶а•В а§ђа§ња§Ца•За§∞а§§а§Њ а§Па§Х а§®а§Ча§Ѓа§Њ - 'а§Ѓа•За§∞а§Њ а§Ъа§Ња§Ба§¶ а§Ѓа•Ба§Эа•З а§Жа§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И а§®а§Ьа§Ља§∞'а•§ а§ѓа§є а§Ча§Ња§®а§Њ а§Єа§ња§∞а•На§Ђ а§Па§Х а§Іа•Ба§® а§®а§єа•Аа§В, а§ђа§≤а•На§Ха§њ а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ха•А а§Ча§єа§∞а§Ња§Иа§ѓа•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§°а•Ва§ђа§Њ а§єа•Ба§Ж а§Па§Х а§Па§єа§Єа§Ња§Є а§єа•Иа•§ а§За§Є а§Ча§Ња§®а•З а§Ха•З а§ђа•Ла§≤, а§Єа§Ва§Ча•Аа§§, а§Фа§∞ а§Ха•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Єа§Ња§®а•В а§Ха•А а§Жа§µа§Ња§Ьа§Љ а§Ѓа§ња§≤а§Ха§∞ а§Па§Х а§Ра§Єа§Њ а§Ѓа§Ња§єа•Ма§≤ а§ђа§®а§Ња§§а•З а§єа•Иа§В а§Ьа•Л а§Єа•Аа§Іа•З а§¶а§ња§≤ а§Ха•Л а§Ыа•В а§Ьа§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§ѓа§є а§Ча§Ња§®а§Њ а§єа§Ѓа•За§В а§Йа§Є а§¶а•Ма§∞ а§Ха•А а§ѓа§Ња§¶ а§¶а§ња§≤а§Ња§§а§Њ а§єа•И а§Ьа§ђ а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ха§Њ а§За§Ьа§Ља§єа§Ња§∞ а§ђа§°а§Ља•А а§Єа§Ња§¶а§Ча•А а§Фа§∞ а§Ѓа§Ња§Єа•Ва§Ѓа§ња§ѓа§§ а§Єа•З а§Ха§ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ьа§Ња§§а§Њ а§•а§Ња•§

'а§Ѓа•За§∞а§Њ а§Ъа§Ња§Ба§¶ а§Ѓа•Ба§Эа•З а§Жа§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И а§®а§Ьа§Ља§∞' а§Ђа§ња§≤а•На§Ѓ 'а§Ѓа§ња§Єа•На§Яа§∞ а§Жа§ґа§ња§Х' а§Ха§Њ а§Па§Х а§Еа§®а§Ѓа•Ла§≤ а§∞а§§а•На§® а§єа•И, а§Ьа•Л а§Жа§Ь а§≠а•А а§≤а§Ња§Ца•Ла§В а§¶а§ња§≤а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§ђа§Єа§Њ а§єа•Ба§Ж а§єа•Иа•§ а§Ха•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Єа§Ња§®а•В а§®а•З а§Еа§™а§®а•А а§Жа§µа§Ња§Ьа§Љ а§Єа•З а§За§Є а§Ча§Ња§®а•З а§Ха•Л а§Еа§Ѓа§∞ а§ђа§®а§Њ а§¶а§ња§ѓа§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§За§Є а§Ча§Ња§®а•З а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ха•А а§§а§°а§Ља§™, а§Ѓа§ња§≤а§®а•З а§Ха•А а§Ца•Ба§ґа•А, а§Фа§∞ а§ђа§ња§Ыа§°а§Ља§®а•З а§Ха§Њ а§Ча§Ѓ а§Єа§ђ а§Ха•Ба§Ы а§ђа§°а§Ља•А а§Ца•Ва§ђа§Єа•Ва§∞а§§а•А а§Єа•З а§™а§ња§∞а•Ла§ѓа§Њ а§Ча§ѓа§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§ѓа§є а§Ча§Ња§®а§Њ а§Йа§® а§Єа§≠а•А а§™а•На§∞а•За§Ѓа§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§Па§Х а§Єа•Ма§Ча§Ња§§ а§єа•И а§Ьа•Л а§Еа§™а§®а•З а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ха•Л а§ґа§ђа•На§¶а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§ђа§ѓа§Ња§В а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ха§∞ а§™а§Ња§§а•За•§

'а§Ѓа•За§∞а§Њ а§Ъа§Ња§Ба§¶ а§Ѓа•Ба§Эа•З а§Жа§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И а§®а§Ьа§Ља§∞' а§Ђа§ња§≤а•На§Ѓ 'а§Ѓа§ња§Єа•На§Яа§∞ а§Жа§ґа§ња§Х' а§Ха§Њ а§Па§Х а§Еа§®а§Ѓа•Ла§≤ а§∞а§§а•На§® а§єа•И, а§Ьа•Л а§Жа§Ь а§≠а•А а§≤а§Ња§Ца•Ла§В а§¶а§ња§≤а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§ђа§Єа§Њ а§єа•Ба§Ж а§єа•Иа•§ а§Ха•Ба§Ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Єа§Ња§®а•В а§®а•З а§Еа§™а§®а•А а§Жа§µа§Ња§Ьа§Љ а§Єа•З а§За§Є а§Ча§Ња§®а•З а§Ха•Л а§Еа§Ѓа§∞ а§ђа§®а§Њ а§¶а§ња§ѓа§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§За§Є а§Ча§Ња§®а•З а§Ѓа•За§В а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ха•А а§§а§°а§Ља§™, а§Ѓа§ња§≤а§®а•З а§Ха•А а§Ца•Ба§ґа•А, а§Фа§∞ а§ђа§ња§Ыа§°а§Ља§®а•З а§Ха§Њ а§Ча§Ѓ а§Єа§ђ а§Ха•Ба§Ы а§ђа§°а§Ља•А а§Ца•Ва§ђа§Єа•Ва§∞а§§а•А а§Єа•З а§™а§ња§∞а•Ла§ѓа§Њ а§Ча§ѓа§Њ а§єа•Иа•§ а§ѓа§є а§Ча§Ња§®а§Њ а§Йа§® а§Єа§≠а•А а§™а•На§∞а•За§Ѓа§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§Ха•З а§≤а§ња§П а§Па§Х а§Єа•Ма§Ча§Ња§§ а§єа•И а§Ьа•Л а§Еа§™а§®а•З а§™а•На§ѓа§Ња§∞ а§Ха•Л а§ґа§ђа•На§¶а•Ла§В а§Ѓа•За§В а§ђа§ѓа§Ња§В а§®а§єа•Аа§В а§Ха§∞ а§™а§Ња§§а•За•§

snippet.title: Hostel (Official Video) | Kaur B | Shree Brar | Avvy Sra | Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Experience the perfect blend of romance, power, and loyalty with Hostel, the latest Punjabi anthem by Kaur B featuring Shree Brar.
This track tells the story of a girl who walks through her hostel and the world with her head held high. snippet.title: [HI] FFMAI 2026 Spring | South Asia Play-Ins Day 3 | Group A - C
snippet.description:
Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Spring continues with the South Asia Play-Ins, featuring top teams from India, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Pakistan.

Day 3 of SA Play-Ins: GROUP A vs GROUP C

The final day of the Play-Ins will decide the top 8 teams advancing to the Main Event on May 14.

Group A
вЩ¶ NXT Esports
вЩ¶ iQOO Total Gaming
вЩ¶ Raiders United
вЩ¶ Reflex United
вЩ¶ NoMoreMercy
вЩ¶ DP Dominators

Group C
вЩ¶ Revenant XSpark
вЩ¶ RNX Esports
вЩ¶ Flame Esports
вЩ¶ Max Esports
вЩ¶ Tonde Nepal Esports
вЩ¶ Total Winner

Schedule рЯУЛ
рЯУЕ SA Play-Ins - May 8, 9, 10
рЯУЕ Main Event Group Stage - May 14, 15, 16
рЯУЕ Grand Finals - May 18

Who will be the champion of Asia? Who will Rise Through Fire?

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #RiseThroughFire

а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™єа™Ња™∞аЂЗ а™ЬаЂАа™µа™µа™Ња™®а™Њ а™Єа™™а™®а™Њ а™§а™ЃаЂЗ а™ЬаЂЛа™ѓа™Ња™§а™Њ
а™Ъа™Ѓ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™ЧаЂЛа™°аЂА а™єа™µаЂЗ а™∞аЂЛа™Ѓ а™ЦаЂЛа™ѓа™Њ а™ЄаЂЗ 
а™Ъа™Ѓ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™ЧаЂЛа™°аЂА а™єа™µаЂЗ а™∞аЂЛа™Ѓ а™ЦаЂЛа™ѓа™Њ а™ЄаЂЗ 
а™єаЂЛ а™ЬаЂЛа™ѓа™Њ а™§а™Ѓа™®аЂЗ а™ђаЂАа™Ьа™Њ а™єа™Ња™∞аЂЗ а™¶а™ња™≤ а™§аЂВа™ЯаЂНа™ѓаЂБа™В а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂБ а™Па™Ь а™¶а™Ња™°аЂЗ 
а™ЬаЂЛа™ѓа™Њ а™§а™Ѓа™®аЂЗ а™ђаЂАа™Ьа™Њ а™єа™Ња™∞аЂЗ а™¶а™ња™≤ а™§аЂВа™ЯаЂНа™ѓаЂБа™В а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂБ а™Па™Ь а™¶а™Ња™°аЂЗ 
а™єаЂЗ а™™аЂЗа™≤аЂА а™®а™Ьа™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞а™Њ а™•аЂА а™Ѓа™® а™ЃаЂЛа™ѓа™Ња™§а™Њ

snippet.title: IMAYE (Official Lyric Video) | Shabir Sulthan | Srinisha Jayaseelan | Roshan Jamrock
snippet.description:
#MustDateThePlayboy #MDTP #SingaporeTamil #TamilSeries #TamilDrama #TamilLoveSeries #TamilRomance #YouthLoveStory #CollegeLove #TamilWebSeries #Vasantham #MeWatch #ZaynAndTara #TamilTrending #LoveDrama #TamilAudience #PlayboySeries #TamilCouple #RomanticSeries #SingaporeDrama #Shorts

вАШIMAYEвАЩ is a cinematic Tamil melody that blends classic melody, rap, R&B and Indian semi-classical influences into a contemporary soundscape.

Composed and written by Shabir Sulthan, the song is performed by Shabir Sulthan alongside Srinisha Jayaseelan and Roshan Jamrock. вАШIMAYEвАЩ also serves as the official opening soundtrack of MediacorpвАЩs hit series Must Date The Playboy directed by trendsetting filmmaker T Suriavelan. 

Available on all major streaming platforms. 

Listen to IMAYE on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/6l9QzVbtnlN4BTrO7ZQZ3O?si=4250d42c6ff040f7

snippet.description:
Experience pure romance with Toota Jo Kabhi Tara from the movie A Flying Jatt, featuring the charming onвАСscreen chemistry of Tiger Shroff and Jacqueline Fernandez.
рЯОґ Beautifully composed by the talented SachinвАУJigar, this song expresses love, hope, and emotional connection through soulful melodies and heartfelt moments. Presented in 8K Ultra HD, the visuals are richer, sharper, and more immersive than ever, enhancing every romantic scene.

snippet.title: Mitta Ror - Sheesha (Lyrics) ft. Swara Verma
snippet.description:
рЯОµ Mitta Ror - Sheesha (Lyrics) ft. Swara Verma

вПђ Stream вАЬSheeshaвАЭ by "Mitta Ror, Swara Verma" here: https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/412poAqbwD8OC0dYD1nBkV

рЯО§ Song Lyrics: Mitta Ror - Sheesha ft. Swara Verma

Teri Aage Pichhe Laage Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jibb Te Re Pakda Yo Hath Tane Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To Ghabrandi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala Bhut Merepe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Mane Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Dub Gaya Mai Billi Billi Aankhya Mein Bairan

Teri Hasi Ke Hasi Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Me Pair Bhi Na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe Ghane Bair Chhori Re

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi I Think Meri Jaan
Honth Tere Lal Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid Tu Mila Ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane Main Sync Meri Jaan

Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage Se Ameer Chhore Re

Ho Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Mane Dil Ka Tu Lage Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Me Dive Makha Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phhire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

Ho Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
